name: CloneTTS
desc: A lightweight, offline Android Text-to-Speech (TTS) engine enabling seamless system-wide voice cloning and high-fidelity text reading. / 运行在安卓本地的轻量级文字转语音 (TTS)…
descFull: A lightweight, offline Android Text-to-Speech (TTS) engine enabling seamless system-wide voice cloning and high-fidelity text reading. / 运行在安卓本地的轻量级文字转语音 (TTS) 引擎，支持离线发音人提取、零门槛音色克隆与双擎系统级全局听书。
